revision.comment: link to Commons is now defined on wikidata
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Portal<!-- -->|Religion<!-- -->|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title year}}}}<!-- -->}} '''[[Religion]]''' in the year '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''. {{Navseasoncats with decades below year}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Religion by year|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:{{Title year}}|Religion]] [[Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} in religion|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] [[en:1939 in religion]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] [[en:1939 in religion]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories from wikipedia
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 1 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9102548)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Portal<!--
-->|Religion<!--
-->|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title year}}}}<!--
-->}}
{{Title year}}
{{Navseasoncats with decades below year}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q9102548}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:1939 in religion]]
[[en:Category:1939 in religion]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Title year}}|Religion]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22542364787|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1939_in_religion here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
